checks.expression:
(role = 'viewer' and viewer_regime is not null)
    or (role <> 'viewer' and viewer_regime is null)

(role = 'viewer' and viewer_regime is not null)
    or (role <> 'viewer' and viewer_regime is null)

linked_external_kind is null
           or linked_external_kind in ('workspace', 'org')

(linked_external_kind is null
      and linked_workspace_document_id is null
      and linked_org_document_id is null)
    or (linked_external_kind = 'workspace'
      and linked_org_document_id is null)
    or (linked_external_kind = 'org'
      and linked_workspace_document_id is null)
not is_final or task_id is not null
client_vat_bps is null or (client_vat_bps >= 0 and client_vat_bps <= 10000)
markup_bps is null or (markup_bps >= 0 and markup_bps <= 10000)
discount_bps_override is null or (discount_bps_override >= 0 and discount_bps_override <= 10000)
not is_final or task_id is not null

(owner_kind = 'system' and owner_id is null)
      or (owner_kind = 'org' and owner_id is not null)
      or (owner_kind = 'profile' and owner_id is not null)
default_markup_bps is null or (default_markup_bps >= 0 and default_markup_bps <= 10000)
default_discount_bps is null or (default_discount_bps >= 0 and default_discount_bps <= 10000)

case
      when is_recurrent_charge then parent_intent_id is not null
      else parent_intent_id is null
    end
